This is an excellent presentation....much better than Netflix usual fare. His colleague in the film and co-star, Lily Santiago plays her roles so well; as a diligent former LA cop and a mother whose tolerance and nurturing nature complement the very difficult Eric Bana role well.

The somewhat twisting and turning storyline all occurs in the incredible beauty of Yosemite.
